
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Earth Goat|kanji=己未|romaji=tsuchinoto hitsuji|onyomi=kibi|p=jǐwèi|w=chi-wei|mi=t͡ɕi³⁵ weɪ̯|y=gei2 mei6|j=gei2 mei6|ci=kei mei|mc=kɨj mei|oc-bs=kɯʔ mei|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Earth Goat also known as 己未''' (tsuchinotohitsuji, kidonohitsuji, kibi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 56th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bokugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|戊午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bokugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Koushin|ja|庚申|1=Kōshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=庚申|4=zh|5=庚申|6=ko|7=경신|lt_ko=경신|8=fr|9=Singe de métal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kōshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Ki|ja|己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|lt=Tsuchinoto (己)|2=ja|3=己|4=zh|5=己|1=Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoto (己)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Goat|ja|未|1=wèi|lt=Goat (未)|2=ja|3=未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat|13=User:Immanuelle/Goat (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q20128396}} represents yin {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|lt=Earth (土)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth|13=User:Immanuelle/Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|lt=Earth (土)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|1=比和|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|2=ja|3=五行思想#比和（ひわ）|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=Ου Σιν|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (比和)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Earth Goat (己未)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jǐwèi
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gei2 mei6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoto-hitsuji
***Kunyomi 2: Kido-no-hitsuji
***Onyomi 1: kibi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gimi (기미)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Kỷ Mùi

==Years of Yin Earth Goat==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 59 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Earth Goat (己未)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 59|en|AD 59|qid=Q31311|lt=59 AD|1=AD 59}}
* {{ill|AD 119|en|AD 119|qid=Q30000|lt=119 AD|1=AD 119}}
* {{ill|179|en|179|qid=Q31352|lt=179 AD|1=179}}
* {{ill|239|en|239|qid=Q30753|lt=239 AD|1=239}}
* {{ill|299|en|299|qid=Q32377|lt=299 AD|1=299}}
* {{ill|359|en|359|qid=Q32448|lt=359 AD|1=359}}
* {{ill|419|en|419|qid=Q32386|lt=419 AD|1=419}}
* {{ill|479|en|479|qid=Q30989|lt=479 AD|1=479}}
* {{ill|539|en|539|qid=Q32891|lt=539 AD|1=539}}
* {{ill|599|en|599|qid=Q34050|lt=599 AD|1=599}}
* {{ill|659|en|659|qid=Q31092|lt=659 AD|1=659}}
* {{ill|719|en|719|qid=Q23537|lt=719 AD|1=719}}
* {{ill|779|en|779|qid=Q31124|lt=779 AD|1=779}}
* {{ill|839|en|839|qid=Q23874|lt=839 AD|1=839}}
* {{ill|899|en|899|qid=Q23734|lt=899 AD|1=899}}
* {{ill|959|en|959|qid=Q23750|lt=959 AD|1=959}}
|
* {{ill|1019|en|1019|qid=Q19252|lt=1019 AD|1=1019}}
* {{ill|1079|en|1079|qid=Q19445|lt=1079 AD|1=1079}}
* {{ill|1139|en|1139|qid=Q19608|lt=1139 AD|1=1139}}
* {{ill|1199|en|1199|qid=Q19752|lt=1199 AD|1=1199}}
* {{ill|1259|en|1259|qid=Q5507|lt=1259 AD|1=1259}}
* {{ill|1319|en|1319|qid=Q5767|lt=1319 AD|1=1319}}
* {{ill|1379|en|1379|qid=Q6316|lt=1379 AD|1=1379}}
* {{ill|1439|en|1439|qid=Q6380|lt=1439 AD|1=1439}}
* {{ill|1499|en|1499|qid=Q6708|lt=1499 AD|1=1499}}
* {{ill|1559|en|1559|qid=Q6609|lt=1559 AD|1=1559}}
* {{ill|1619|en|1619|qid=Q6804|lt=1619 AD|1=1619}}
* {{ill|1679|en|1679|qid=Q7638|lt=1679 AD|1=1679}}
* {{ill|1739|en|1739|qid=Q7002|lt=1739 AD|1=1739}}
* {{ill|1799|en|1799|qid=Q7827|lt=1799 AD|1=1799}}
* {{ill|1859|en|1859|qid=Q7687|lt=1859 AD|1=1859}}
* {{ill|1919|en|1919|qid=Q2157|lt=1919 AD|1=1919}}
* {{ill|1979|en|1979|qid=Q2484|lt=1979 AD|1=1979}}
|
* {{ill|2039 AD|ja|2039年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2039|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2039 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2099 AD|ja|2099年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2099|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2099 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2090年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=2090s|qid=Q845811}}
* {{ill|2159 AD|ja|2159年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2159|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2159 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2219 AD|ja|2219年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2219|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2219 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2279 AD|ja|2279年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2279|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2279 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2339 AD|ja|2339年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2339|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2339 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2399 AD|ja|2399年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2399|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2399 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2459 AD|ja|2459年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2459|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2459 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2519 AD|ja|2519年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2519|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2519 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2579 AD|ja|2579年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2579|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2579 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2639 AD|ja|2639年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2639|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2639 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2699 AD|ja|2699年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2699|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2699 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2759 AD|ja|2759年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2759|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2759 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2819 AD|ja|2819年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2819|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2819 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2879 AD|ja|2879年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2879|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2879 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2939 AD|ja|2939年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2939|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2939 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2999 AD|ja|2999年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2999|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2999 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 3千年紀|1=3rd millennium|qid=Q26224}}
|}

==Months of Yin Earth Goat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|June|en|June|qid=Q120|lt=June|1=June}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Xiaoshu|en|Xiaoshu|qid=Q1190976|lt=Minor Heat|1=Xiaoshu}} until the day before {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|qid=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Earth Goat==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Kibi|ja|1=Yin Earth Goat|2=ja|己未|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kibi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Goat|qq=}} is the 5th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|八専|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).
==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Earth Goat|qq=ja|己未|version=84123855|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q904801|af|Aardbok (astrologie)|cdo|Gī-ê|de|Erde-Schaf|hak|Kí-vi|ja|己未|ko|기미|vi|Kỷ Mùi|za|Geijmeih|zh-min-nan|Kí-bī|zh-yue|己未|zh|己未|zh-min-nan|Teng-chik|zh-yue|丁亥|cdo|Dĭng-cṳ̄de|nds|Feuer-Varkvi|de|Yin Earth Goat|fr|Chèvre de terre|af|Vuurvark (astrologie)|de|Feuer-Schweineen|en|Fire Pig|fr|Cochon de feushak|it|Ding-chṳ́id|ko|정해|vi|Đinh Hợi|za|Dingceij|zh|丁亥|ar|Yin Earth Goat}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
